title: Rāmganj Heavy Rain
lead: Rāmganj experiences extreme heavy rain with a Z-Score of +3.06. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The heavy rain in Rāmganj has resulted in significant precipitation, with a critical level warning issued. 
 The current humidity is at 86% and the wind speed is 9.6 km/h, contributing to the severe weather conditions. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, while the Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 9.7 GG, indicating a high demand for cooling.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to flooding
energia_impact: Power outages possible due to storm
